title: Itertools, Infinite Streams, and Bounded Pipelines · Pipeline Brief: Bounded Consumption
summary: Create schedule combinations and rolling windows without materializing an unbounded search space. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp bounded consumption increment in a lazy scheduling and windowing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Attach explicit limits, backpressure decisions, and cancellation to open-ended iterators.
Implement pairwise, batched, accumulated, and sliding-window transformations with edge cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Bounded Consumption
